research.summary: Comprehensive overview of MiMo architecture (MoE, multimodal fusion), release history (v1.0 through HyperOS 1.0), benchmarks (C-Eval >80%, 60+ tok/s on-device), API pricing, and ecosystem adoption.

highlights: MiMo is a foundational AI model deeply integrated into Xiaomi's Human x Car x Home ecosystem
Bifurcated architecture: cloud foundation models + lightweight on-device models optimized for NPUs
Powers HyperOS 1.0 features including real-time transcription, AI image generation, and Xiao Ai voice assistant
Integrated into the Xiaomi SU7 electric vehicle for voice commands and infotainment
Cloud version scores above 80% on C-Eval; on-device achieves 60+ tokens/second on Snapdragon 8 Gen 3
Proprietary model with API pricing and free tier (1M tokens/month) for developers
Key differentiator is aggressive on-device deployment with lower latency and improved privacy
